title: NHKマイルCの後に・宙吊り

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Agnes Tachyon finishes the NHK Mile C.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I propose that she follow the established race
schedule and aim for the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She consents but suggests that I not get my hopes
up as she leaves the venue.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still uncertain as to whether or not she'll run in
the Kikuka Sho, we begin our preparations all the
same.
